---
title: "Course catalogue"
subtitle: "Every UBCO course relevant to the Freshwater Science program"
date: last-modified
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Scaffold placeholder
The catalogue is populated by `data-raw/01_scrape_ubco_calendar.R` and
rendered from `data/courses.parquet`. The scraper has not yet run.
:::

::: {.callout-note}
## Authoritative UBC pages
For the official program record:

- [UBC Undergraduate Admissions — Freshwater Science](https://you.ubc.ca/ubc_programs/freshwater-science/)
- [Department of EESC — Freshwater Science](https://eesc.ok.ubc.ca/undergraduate/freshwater-science/)
- [UBC Academic Calendar — Freshwater Science requirements](https://okanagan.calendar.ubc.ca/faculties-schools-and-colleges/faculty-science/bachelor-science-programs/major-programs/freshwater-science)
:::

# Browse by subject

The Freshwater Science program draws from these UBCO subjects (codes in
the format the calendar uses):

- **FWSC_O** — Freshwater Science (program-specific courses)
- **BIOL_O** — Biology
- **EESC_O** — Earth and Environmental Sciences
- **CHEM_O** — Chemistry
- **GEOG_O** — Geography
- **MATH_O** — Mathematics
- **PHYS_O** — Physics
- **STAT_O** — Statistics
- **INDG_O** — Indigenous Studies
- **ENGL_O** — English

When the scraper is wired up, this page will render a sortable table
with: course code, title, credits, lecture-lab pattern, prerequisites,
equivalencies, and an "offered next academic year?" badge.

# Year structure (Freshwater Science Major)

::: {#year-1}

## Year 1 (30 credits)

- BIOL_O 116 and 125 (6)
- CHEM_O 121 and 123 (6)
- EESC_O 111 and 112 (6)
- MATH_O 100 (3) plus one of MATH_O 101 or 103 (3)
- One of PHYS_O 111 or 112 (3) plus one of PHYS_O 121 or 122 (3)

:::

## Year 2 (30 credits)

- BIOL_O 201 (3)
- One of BIOL_O 202, GEOG_O 271, STAT_O 121, STAT_O 230 (3)
- One of CHEM_O 201 or 210 (3) plus CHEM_O 211 (3)
- EESC_O 205 and 222 (6)
- English / communication electives (6)
- INDG_O 100 or ENGL_O 114 (3)
- Non-science electives (3)

## Years 3 and 4 (60 credits)

- BIOL_O 308 (3)
- FWSC_O 375 (3)
- CHEM_O 301 (3)
- EESC_O 212, 301, 402 (9)
- One of EESC_O 342, 413, 435 (3)
- Two of EESC_O 309, 323, 423 (6)
- One of EESC_O 313, 314, 315 (3)
- Upper-level science electives (9)
- Non-science electives (6)
- General electives (15)

# Honours

The Honours track requires a 76% minimum grade average in 24 credits
from designated upper-level courses plus EESC_O 449 (Honours Thesis, 6
credits).
